title: February 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 1''' is the 32nd day of the year. There are 333 days remaining, (334 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Tony Baxter]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Diana Schutz]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Gilbert Hernandez]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Mark Dodson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Meg Cabot]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 33|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 33]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 137|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 137]] published.
*[[1993]] – [[Classic Star Wars 7|''Classic Star Wars'' 7]] published.
*[[1994]] – ''[[Classic Star Wars 16]]'' published.
*1994 – [[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 9|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 9]] published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' published.
*1997 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron ½|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron ½'']] published.
*1997 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 16|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 16]] published.
*1997 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 12|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 12]] published.
*1997 – ''[[Star Wars Chronicles]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 18: Rogue Squadron to the Rescue]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Uncertain Path]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]'' and [[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker|''Episode I Adventures Game Book 6'']] published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Master of Deception]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dawn of the Jedi 0]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – [[Robin Sachs]] dies.
*[[2017]] – [[Robert Turk]] dies.
*2017 – [[Star Wars (2015) 28|''Star Wars'' (2015) 28]] published.
*2017 – [[Darth Maul (2017) 1|''Darth Maul'' (2017) 1]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Yoda vs Count Dooku – Size Matters Not]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – ''[[The High Republic: The Battle for Starlight]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The High Republic: Midnight Horizon]]'' published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic: Midnight Horizon (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Midnight Horizon'' audiobook]] released.
*2022 – [[Brian Augustyn]] dies.
*[[2023]] – "[[Tribe]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Sana Starros 1|''Sana Starros'' 1]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Carl Weathers]] dies.
*[[2025]] – "[[Nubs Gets Stuck]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
*2025 – [[Martin Gordon]] dies.
